column1: # policy: entries must be explicitly reviewed; new findings fail CI until added with rationale.

column4: Machine-readable token persistence status code; not a credential or secret.
Path uses an interface name returned by the local kernel through net.Interfaces plus a fixed sysfs statistics suffix.
Key-value reader is called only for the fixed local /etc/os-release metadata path.
Trimmed metadata reader is called only with fixed local /proc and /sys paths selected by the agent.
Managed configuration path is checked with Lstat, restricted to a regular file, and matched to the opened inode before bounded reading.
Managed configuration path is checked with Lstat, restricted to a regular file, and matched to the opened inode before bounded reading.
Parent PID is parsed as a bounded unsigned integer and logged with the numeric percent-d formatter.
Host proof executes only the exact staged release binary selected from a fixed manifest target map, with empty environment, timeout, and bounded output.
Deterministic release archive is a public distributable and is intentionally created mode 0644 after no-replace path validation.
Source archive extraction writes only validated safe relative paths under a fresh private destination using O_EXCL and bounded file sizes.
Exported go.mod is a required validated regular file inside the freshly extracted release source tree.
Archive source is validated as a regular file, matched to the opened inode, bounded by size, and required to match the exact entry name.
Archive output path is prechecked for nonexistence and created with O_EXCL so no existing file or symlink is followed.
Release archive input is validated as a regular bounded file before gzip/tar verification.
Pinned public key path is fixed under the repository release directory and validated as a small regular non-symlink file.
GitHub release JSON is a local inspection input validated as a small regular non-symlink file and decoded with a bounded reader.
Draft inspection receipt is a local control file validated as a small regular non-symlink file before strict JSON decoding.
Host proof file is validated as a small regular non-symlink file before strict JSON decoding and manifest binding.
Release asset files are validated as regular non-symlink files with bounded size and before/after SameFile checks while hashing.
Release control output uses a validated non-symlink parent and O_EXCL no-replace creation.
Sealed release manifest is validated as a small regular file and compared byte-for-byte against the regenerated manifest.
Release binary is validated as a bounded regular file with executable magic, architecture, and Go build-info checks.
Signed metadata path is derived from validated asset names and read only after small regular-file validation.
Detached signature path is derived from validated asset names and read only after small regular-file validation.
Checksum path is derived from a validated manifest asset and read only after small regular-file validation.
Build record path is fixed in the private release-control directory and validated as a small regular file before strict JSON decoding.
Release manifest path is fixed in the private release-control directory and validated as a small regular file before strict JSON decoding.
